prose: The Fukui reactivity calculation on acrolein using DFT with B3LYP functional and def2-TZVP basis set (tier 'standard') in the gas phase with charge 0 and multiplicity 1 was successfully completed. The method used is DFT, and the key reactive sites identified are the carbon atom on the double bond (most electrophilic) and the oxygen atom (most nucleophilic). The numeric value reported for the main reactivity indicator is approximately 11.07 (exact to the computed precision). Warnings about charge drift were present but did not compromise the trustworthiness of the calculation.
